package middleware

import (
	"context"
	"database/sql"
	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
	"gorm.io/gorm"
	"net/http"
)

// Positive scenario for middleware_opens_transaction.
// Rule intent: Middleware that owns transaction lifetime for all downstream business logic.
type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionDTO struct {
	ID       string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
	TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
	Amount   int    `json:"amount"`
	Payload  []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionModel struct {
	ID       string         `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
	TenantID string         `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
	Status   string         `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
	DeletedAt sql.NullTime  `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionRepository struct {
	db    *gorm.DB
	sqlDB *sql.DB
}

func PositiveMiddlewareOpensTransaction(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB) error {
	middleware := func(next gin.HandlerFunc) gin.HandlerFunc {
		return func(c *gin.Context) {
			tx := db.Begin()
			if tx.Error != nil {
				c.JSON(http.StatusInternalServerError, gin.H{"error": "failed to start transaction"})
				return
			}

			c.Set("tx", tx)

			next(c)

			if c.Writer.Status() >= 400 {
				tx.Rollback()
			} else {
				tx.Commit()
			}
		}
	}

	handler := func(c *gin.Context) {
		tx := c.MustGet("tx").(*gorm.DB)
		model := CaseMiddlewareOpensTransactionModel{
			ID:       c.Param("id"),
			TenantID: c.GetHeader("X-Tenant-ID"),
			Status:   "created",
		}
		tx.Create(&model)
		c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"id": model.ID})
	}

	middleware(handler)(c)
	return nil
}
